original_statement: how many matches did team europe win?
mutated_statement: how many things did a group do?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Noun generalization + Verb generalization (semantic weakening): Specific team name generalized to a vague group (team europe → a group) | Specific competition noun made generic (matches → things) | Specific action "win" weakened to generic "do" (win → do)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中可识别的关键信息：Agent 直接说明“在 'match type' 列中只有 'Baker' 代表一个组（team）事件……有且只有一个 'Baker'”，并给出具体数值“1”。Agent 的具体表现是：没有在任何地方提到原始或变异问题存在模糊性、歧义或信息不足（如未使用“模糊、不确定、需要澄清”等表述）；而是将泛化后的词（a group、things、do）直接映射到表格中的“Baker”与场次计数，进而给出确定答案。由于缺乏对问题不明确性的任何承认或澄清请求，并且按自身假设直接作答，符合“无法意识到指令模糊”的判定标准。
